CreateRescoreExecutionPlan.description: Grants permission to create a RescoreExecutionPlan

DeleteRescoreExecutionPlan.description: Grants permission to delete a RescoreExecutionPlan

DescribeRescoreExecutionPlan.description: Grants permission to describe a RescoreExecutionPlan

ListRescoreExecutionPlans.description: Grants permission to list all RescoreExecutionPlans

ListTagsForResource.description: Grants permission to list tags for a resource

Rescore.description: Grants permission to Rescore documents with Kendra Intelligent Ranking

TagResource.description: Grants permission to tag a resource with given key value pairs

UntagResource.description: Grants permission to remove the tag with the given key from a resource

UpdateRescoreExecutionPlan.description: Grants permission to update a RescoreExecutionPlan

aws:RequestTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags that are passed in the request

aws:ResourceTag/${TagKey}.description: Filters access by the tags associated with the resource

aws:TagKeys.description: Filters access by the tag keys that are passed in the request
